indicators.name: absence of cooking appliances
indicators.rationale: There are no stoves, ovens, or refrigerators visible, which are essential for cooking.

indicators.name: absence of water fixture
indicators.rationale: No sink is present, which is crucial for food preparation and hygiene.

indicators.name: absence of hard prep surfaces
indicators.rationale: No countertops or hard washable work surfaces are available for food preparation.

indicators.name: absence of storage space
indicators.rationale: No cabinets or shelves are visible to store ingredients and cookware.

indicators.name: absence of lighting control
indicators.rationale: No visible light switches or dimmers are present, making it difficult to control the lighting for cooking.

reasoning_summary: This indoor scene is completely unsuitable for daily cooking. There are no cooking appliances, no water fixture, no hard prep surfaces, no storage space, and no lighting control, making it impossible to perform any cooking activities.
